metadata_mapping.performers: a[href*='/models/'] on scene pages, filtering placeholders such as 'pornstar'
metadata_mapping.tags: Scene tag list links to /search/<tag>/; meta property='video:tag' is a fallback

search_strategy.notes: KVS search at /search/<query>/ — returns paginated HTML listing.

anti_bot_or_access_notes: Cloudflare managed challenge blocks non-browser clients in this environment; browser rendering still works.
Set Cookie: age_verified=1; kt_tc=1 to bypass age gate.
Browser inspection on May 11, 2026 confirmed standard KVS route map and the /search/<query>/ path.
Use conservative request delays and return empty results gracefully when challenged.
known_limitations: Cloudflare can still prevent scene/search fetches from script environments even with browser-like headers.
Scene dates may only be exposed as relative text on-page, requiring best-effort conversion.
